t_ch: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
t_en: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

t_ch: 不知道他能坚持多久…
t_en: How long do you think he'll hold out for...?

t_ch: 他一定能坚持到我们返回。
t_en: Until our return. I'm sure of it.

t_ch: 「不死之身」是怎么回事？
t_en: What's this indestructible body about?

t_ch: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
t_en: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

t_ch: 缇安老师，请你回去休息吧。也许很快又会需要你的帮助。
t_en: Go get some rest, Trianne. We might need your help again before you know it.

t_ch: 好…知道啦。小白，还有小灰…你们也要保重。
t_en: Okay... Don't worry about me! Take care of yourselves, too...

t_ch: 走吧，{NICKNAME}…不能再耽搁了，赶紧去找阿格莱雅。
t_en: Let's go, {NICKNAME}... It's a race against time. We have to find Aglaea right away.

t_ch: 他们回来了。
t_en: They're back.

t_ch: 还好么，没受伤吧？我收到白厄的急报了，情况似乎很不乐观。
t_en: Are you okay? Are you injured? Things didn't sound good in Phainon's message.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅——等等，缇宝老师在哪？
t_en: Aglaea— Wait, where's Tribbie?

t_ch: 我们收到了你的传信，她已经去做相应的准备了。
t_en: She began making the necessary preparations the moment we got your message.

t_ch: 城中的公民还和平日一样在寻欢作乐…你认为这算不上一次危机？
t_en: The city's citizens are enjoying themselves like it's any other day... Do you not see this as a crisis?

t_ch: 若要以同样的方式应对每桩危机，奥赫玛会终日不得安宁。于无声中抹去威胁，让他们不必活在恐惧的阴霾之下，才是黄金裔的职责。
t_en: Okhema would be in constant turmoil if we were to raise the alert each time danger befell us. Silently eliminating threats and sparing them from living under the shadow of fear — that is the duty of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 关于这点，我和你的看法一直存在分歧…但现在不是争论的时候。
t_en: I don't see things that way... but now's not the time for arguments.

t_ch: 天谴之锋已经瞄准了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的心脏。如果不设法阻止疯狂的泰坦，整座圣城都可能灰飞烟灭。
t_en: The Blade of Fury has its aim trained on {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s heart. We need to stop the mad Titan, or the entirety of the holy city could be reduced to ash.

t_ch: 但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为自己打造了不灭的躯壳，无法被彻底杀死。万敌正在拖延时间…我们必须珍惜他争取到的每一秒。
t_en: But {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has crafted an indestructible body for themself, one that can't be entirely destroyed. Mydei is buying us time... We need to cherish every second he's fought for.

t_ch: 你在迫使自己冷静，这是成长，白厄。
t_en: You're willing yourself to stay calm, Phainon. That's commendable progress.

t_ch: 但悬锋城隐入迷雾许久，我们无从得知{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神躯不灭的奥秘。
t_en: Castrum Kremnos has been shrouded in the fog far too long, leaving us unable to discover the mystery behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s undying body.

t_ch: …只有一位泰坦能帮助我们寻得真相。
t_en: ...We can only hope to learn the truth from one Titan.

t_ch: 你指的是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: 白厄阁下，我会和你们一同前去谒见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。希望它能为我们重现往昔的风景，揭示{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}欺瞒死亡的真相……
t_en: Lord Phainon, I will join you in the audience with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Let's hope they can restore the visions of the past and reveal the truth behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s defiance of death.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐，你也没有头绪吗？
t_en: You have no clue either, Miss Castorice?

t_ch: 「纷争」和「死亡」曾形影不离。鼎盛时的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}重视荣耀，绝不会背叛盟友。
t_en: Strife and Death used to be inseparable. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} valued honor in their glory days, so they would never have betrayed their allies back then.

t_ch: 但自它陷入疯狂后，誓约便不复存在。现在看来…为了追求不朽的躯体，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已经背叛了「死亡」。
t_en: But their pact was broken when {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} descended into madness. From what we know so far... in the pursuit of an immortal body, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} betrayed Death.

t_ch: 还有另一件事。悬锋堡的石板上提到了「渗透」……
t_en: There's one other thing. We found a slate in Kremnos that mentioned an infiltration...

t_ch: 我和缇宝会竭尽全力守护圣城的公民，各位无需挂虑。
t_en: Don't worry about that. Tribbie and I will do our best to protect the people of our holy city.

t_ch: 找到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，用你们所能想到的一切手段揭露疯王的秘密。
t_en: Focus on getting to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and using whatever means possible to learn the mad Titan's secrets.

t_ch: 缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
t_en: Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.

t_ch: 缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
t_en: Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.

t_ch: 缇宝老师！我们准备好了。
t_en: Tribbie! We're ready to set off.

t_ch: 嗯，情况*我们*已经了解了。这次就由*我们*送大家去重渊。
t_en: Okay, we've been updated on what has happened. Let us send you into the Abyss this time.

t_ch: 这样没问题吗？以往都是缇安老师……
t_en: Are you sure? It's always been Trianne doing this...

t_ch: 悬锋城这两去两回，缇安已经用光了力气，需要些时间恢复。
t_en: The two trips to and from Castrum Kremnos have completely drained Trianne. She'll need some time to recover.

t_ch: 不用为*我们*担心，小白…这是为了小敌，也是为了大家。
t_en: We can handle this, Snowy... This is as much for De as it is for everyone else.

t_ch: 缇宝大人…该如何让{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}回应我们的呼唤，你有什么建议吗？
t_en: High Priest Tribbie... Do you have any suggestions on how we can get {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to respond to us later?

t_ch: 抱歉，阿蝶，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}从来都不是一位喜爱与人交流的泰坦。在这件事上，*我们*恐怕也爱莫能助。
t_en: Sorry... We wish we could help, Cas, but {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has never been a Titan to chat or interact with humans.

t_ch: 看来…我们只能依靠自己寻找方法了。
t_en: I suppose... we'll have to rely on ourselves, then.

t_ch: 我们不是能借用它的力量吗？
t_en: But don't they let us use their power?

t_ch: 借用跟统一阵线终归是两回事。假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
t_en: It's one thing to use their powers and another to be aligned with us in war. If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.

t_ch: 听上去根本就是在碰运气…
t_en: Sounds like we're leaving it up to luck...

t_ch: 假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
t_en: If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它不是一位生性险恶的泰坦，希望我们不必走到那一步。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... isn't an evil Titan at heart. Let us hope things won't reach that point.

t_ch: 事态紧迫，各位…出发吧。
t_en: Time is of the essence, everyone... We should get going.

t_ch: 我们到啦——「百界门」只能把各位送到这里。
t_en: This is it! The Century Gate can only take you this far.

t_ch: 命运三相殿虽然已经废弃许久，但它的周围仍然残留着祭司们编织的法界。以{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量贸然接近，恐怕会有很大的风险。
t_en: Although the Temple of the Three Fates has been abandoned for a long time, the magical barriers woven by the priests still linger around it. Approaching with {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power recklessly could be extremely risky.

t_ch: 我们理解。谢谢你，缇宝老师。
t_en: We understand. Thank you, Tribbie.

t_ch: *我们*还要赶回奥赫玛协助阿格莱雅。小白，阿蝶——等顺利完成任务后，你们知道该怎么呼唤*我们*。
t_en: We have to go back to Okhema to help Aglaea. Snowy and Cas, we trust that you know how to summon us when you're done.

t_ch: 这个给你们，一定要拿好——<color=#dbc291ff>这是象征雅努斯祭司身份的石符</color>，只要在万径之门前举起它，大门就会为你们敞开。
t_en: Here, keep this with you. <color=#dbc291ff>This token is proof of a Janus priest</color>. Hold it up to the Gate of Infinity, and you'll be able to walk through unimpeded.

t_ch: 保重啦，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮你们的前程。
t_en: Take care, alright? May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} light your path forward.

t_ch: 现在就只剩我们了。
t_en: We're on our own now.

t_ch: 接下来的每一步都至关重要。这不止关系到万敌…还有圣城的全体公民。
t_en: Important decisions will be waiting for us every step of the way. What we're about to do will not only determine Mydei's fate... but also that of every single resident in Okhema.

t_ch: 目的地是「命运三相殿」，也就是「万径之门」背后的建筑——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}栖身于神殿的最深处，我们必须找到它，说服它同我们合作。
t_en: The Temple of the Three Fates is behind the Gate of Infinity, and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is at the very heart of this temple. We're going to have to find {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and convince them to help us in our battle.

t_ch: 但愿一切都能顺利……
t_en: May everything go well for us...

t_ch: 是我们初次见面时的遗迹？看上去似乎有些…不一样。
t_en: Are these... the ruins we saw when we first arrived? They look... somewhat different.

t_ch: （无法辨识的声音）
t_en: *incomprehensible speech*

t_ch: 什么声音？
t_en: What was that?

t_ch: 那是…泰坦在说话，我想应该是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: I believe that was a Titan speaking... I believe it was {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 我需要仔细聆听它的话语……
t_en: I have to listen closely to what they are saying...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「狡猾、粗鄙之人，在厄运将临之际，又打算侵扰我的安宁吗？」
t_en: "Devious and repulsive humans... Are you here to disturb my peace again, just as disaster approaches?"

t_ch: 你能听懂泰坦的语言？
t_en: You know what the Titan is saying?

t_ch: 没字幕你怎么看懂的？
t_en: How can you understand without subtitles?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>遐蝶小姐能解译泰坦的语言</color>——这也是此行必须有她在场的原因。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Miss Castorice can understand the Titans' words</color>. That's exactly why we need her on this trip.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「停下来吧…在错乱的时空中迷失吧……」
t_en: "Cease your efforts... and let yourself be swallowed by the confusion of time and space..."

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}在抗拒？看来这第一步就算不上顺利。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is turning us away? It seems like we've hit an obstacle on the very first step.

t_ch: 莫非这遗迹里呈现出的错乱风景，也是它给我们布下的障碍…？
t_en: Could the Titan have created this chaotic scene we see in these ruins as a barrier to hinder us?

t_ch: 无论什么障碍，我们都必须翻越。
t_en: We'll overcome any obstacle, no matter what they throw at us.

t_ch: 上次经过这里时，缇宝老师向我们展示了该如何应对…现在，该轮到我们复现「神迹」了。
t_en: Tribbie gave us a demonstration when we had to pass through here the last time... It's up to us to recreate these miracles now.

t_ch: 「揭开记忆的帷幕……」
t_en: "Lift the curtain of memory..."

t_ch: 「…再度激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: "...and once again stir the ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}又开口了……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is saying something again...

t_ch: 「…你们有何资格役使我？你们因何能残忍至此？」
t_en: "...Who are you to command me? Does your inhumanity know no end?"

t_ch: 「神迹」…居然是一种强迫泰坦服从的方式吗？
t_en: Are we... actually forcing the Titans to do our bidding with these miracles?

t_ch: 没时间思考这些了，我们继续。
t_en: We can't afford to stop and think about that right now. Let's press on.

t_ch: …打不开？
t_en: ...It won't open?

t_ch: 或许…<color=#dbc291ff>这扇大门只能在「正确」的时空下被打开？</color>
t_en: Perhaps... <color=#dbc291ff>this gate only opens in the right time dimension?</color>

t_ch: 那边——<color=#dbc291ff>那些「奇迹宝珠」也是「岁月」祭司们常用的仪器，说不定能派上用场。</color>
t_en: There! <color=#dbc291ff>Those Miracle Orbs are instruments often used by Time Priests. They could prove handy.</color>

t_ch: 看，<color=#dbc291ff>宝珠映照出了相反的时空。</color>
t_en: Look, <color=#dbc291ff>an inverse time dimension is reflected by those orbs.</color>

t_ch: 再施展一次「神迹」，或许我们就能通过了。
t_en: Let's summon another miracle. Perhaps this time we'll make it through.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: 这就是我们坠落的地点。我们乘坐的车厢遭到了攻击，我和{NICKNAME}险些丢了性命。
t_en: This is where we crash-landed. {NICKNAME} and I nearly died when our car was assaulted.

t_ch: 现在看来，那也是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的手笔。
t_en: Upon reflection, that was probably {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s doing, too.

t_ch: 从近处看，那座大门属实宏伟。
t_en: This gate looks just as magnificent up close.

t_ch: 它象征着「万径之门」{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神权。传说里，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}是命运三泰坦中最年长的一位…它创造了翁法罗斯的「空间」。
t_en: The Gate of Infinity. It represents the divine power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. According to legend, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is the eldest of the Three Titans of Fate. They created the "space" of Amphoreus.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在很久之前便已殒落。归还火种，接过它神权的半神，就是缇宝大人。
t_en: But the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan, Janus}Titan{RUBY_E#} has long fallen and surrendered their Coreflame. Tribbie is the demigod that inherited their divinity.

t_ch: 缇宝是怎么打败泰坦的…
t_en: How did Tribbie defeat a Titan...?

t_ch: 并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
t_en: Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.

t_ch: 但这不代表缇宝老师不够强大…她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
t_en: But that doesn't mean Tribbie isn't powerful enough... She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.

t_ch: 看不出来，原来她很强啊。
t_en: I didn't realize she was that strong.

t_ch: 并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
t_en: Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.

t_ch: 但你说的没错，无需以武力衡量缇宝老师的强大，她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
t_en: But you're not wrong, strength is no measure for how powerful Tribbie is. She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.

t_ch: 走吧。有了缇宝老师的符节，我们应该能顺利进入命运三相殿。
t_en: Let's go. With Tribbie's token, we should be able to go straight into the Temple of the Three Fates.

t_ch: 神殿已被废弃许久，无法判断门后藏着什么危险。从遗迹中传来的声音判断，恐怕那位泰坦也谈不上友善。
t_en: This temple has been forsaken for so long that we have no way of telling what dangers await us behind this gate. From the way Oronyx spoke to us in the ruins, I won't count on them being cordial toward us.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 又来了…
t_en: Here we go again...

t_ch: 求翻译。
t_en: We need a translation for that.

t_ch: blahblahblah…
t_en: Blah blah blah...

t_ch: 「不要靠近…不要进来。」
t_en: "Venture no closer... Keep out."

t_ch: 「这里没有你们在找的东西…只有悲伤和消亡。」
t_en: "You won't find anything you desire here... Save for despair and demise."

t_ch: 是你在说话吗，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士？
t_en: Is that you, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 抱歉——假如你不愿帮助我们——那悲伤和消亡就会变成世上仅剩的东西！
t_en: Forgive me, but if you refuse to help us, then despair and demise will be all that's left on this world!

t_ch: 白厄举起了{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的石符……
t_en: Phainon raises the stone talisman of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: …从命运三相殿内传来了沉重的机关声。
t_en: ...The sound of heavy mechanisms comes from the Temple of the Three Fates.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「你们不受欢迎…你们没有资格。」
t_en: "You are not welcome here... You have no right."

t_ch: 「你们无法通过挑战。」
t_en: "You'll never pass my challenge."

t_ch: 「挑战」？很好，至少它愿意建立沟通了，哪怕是要刁难我们。
t_en: A challenge? Great, at least they're willing to speak to us now. Even if they are only making things difficult for us.

t_ch: 前进吧。记住，留心脚下。
t_en: Push onward, my friends. But watch your step.

t_ch: 「公正天秤」——我还是第一次目睹它的全貌。
t_en: The Scales of Justice. It's my first time seeing it in its full glory.

t_ch: 这也是哪位泰坦的象征物吗？
t_en: Is this also a symbol of a Titan?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，命运三泰坦的第二位。传说中，是它创造了世界运行的「律法」。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the second of the Three Titans of Fate. They were said to have created the laws that govern our world.

t_ch: 它的火种已经归位，但接替神职的黄金裔…如今不知所踪。
t_en: Talanton surrendered their Coreflame, though the Chrysos Heir taking over their legacy is... nowhere to be found today.

t_ch: 至少，维持世界运转的法则依旧稳定。无论那位半神身在何方，都践行了自己的使命。
t_en: At least the laws that govern our world are still in place. So that demigod must be performing their duty still, no matter where they are.

t_ch: 两边都无法通行，出口也被隐藏起来了。{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}真是不欢迎我们啊。
t_en: Neither of these are paths we can take, and the exit has been concealed from us. Looks like {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is bent on keeping us out.

t_ch: 「奇迹典籍」…只能用它碰碰运气了。
t_en: The Tome of Miracles... We'll just have to try our luck with this, then.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「痛…痛…很痛。」
t_en: "Hurts... it hurts... so much."

t_ch: 施展「神迹」…会令它如此痛苦吗？
t_en: Does performing a miracle really... subject them to that much pain?

t_ch: 看，破损的天秤变得完整了。
t_en: Look, the broken scales have been restored to their full form.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「不会…不能…不允许你们继续前进。」
t_en: "No... You cannot... You must not come any closer."

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「天秤即是入口…天秤即是考验。」
t_en: "The scales are as much an entrance... as they are a challenge."

t_ch: 天秤…它是想让我们完成配平吗？
t_en: The scales...? Are they expecting us to balance it?

t_ch: 应该没错。
t_en: I believe so...

t_ch: …你还好吗，遐蝶小姐？
t_en: ...Are you alright, Miss Castorice?

t_ch: 我…没有大碍。只是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的痛苦在和我共鸣。
t_en: I—I'm fine. It's just... I can feel {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s misery.

t_ch: 能听懂泰坦的语言也是一种负担。快点结束这一切吧。
t_en: Being able to understand the Titans' words is as much an affliction as it is a gift. Let's get this over and done with.

t_ch: 那位泰坦，它真的想用这种「考验」刁难我们吗？
t_en: Does that Titan really intend to deter us with a challenge like this?

t_ch: 丹恒阁下的意思是？
t_en: What do you mean, Mr. Dan Heng?

t_ch: 我不理解。如果它拥有神力，难道不该用更粗暴的方式阻拦来犯之人吗？
t_en: This doesn't make sense to me. Oronyx thinks of us as intruders, so isn't it far easier for them to forcefully stop us with their divine powers?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…以我对它的了解，应该不是一位粗暴的神明。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... based on my understanding, isn't the kind that resorts to brutality.

t_ch: 这样就算完成「考验」了吧？
t_en: Does this mean we've passed the challenge?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！我们已经完成了你的挑战，可以让我们通过了吗？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! We completed your challenge. Can you let us pass now?

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「不允许…不承认…不允许你们继续前进。」
t_en: "No... Unsatisfactory... You cannot pass."

t_ch: 看来是位不守信用的泰坦啊。
t_en: Looks like this Titan doesn't like to keep their promises.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「考验…第二次。必须…阻止凡人进入。」
t_en: "Another... challenge. Must deter... the mortals."

t_ch: 它是在故意拖延时间吗？没空陪它玩游戏了……
t_en: Are they just stalling for time? We don't have the time for games...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「现在置于左侧托盘的配重…代表着翁法罗斯的命运。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Weights in the left weighing pan... represent the fate of Amphoreus."</color>

t_ch: 「找到…比它更重的砝码…将它置于右侧的托盘……」
t_en: "Find... something that weighs more... and place it in the right pan..."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「找到比世界的命运…更为沉重之物。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Find something that has more weight... than the fate of the world."</color>

t_ch: 脑筋急转弯？
t_en: Is this a brainteaser?

t_ch: 它说这个谁懂啊！
t_en: Who's going to understand that!?

t_ch: 它似乎有些反复无常，就像是一位…孩童。
t_en: They seem somewhat fickle, much like... a child.

t_ch: 比「世界的命运」更沉重的东西？这题面真令人迷惑。
t_en: Something that has more weight than the fate of the world? That's a baffling riddle.

t_ch: 一动不动…果然没用吗？
t_en: No movement at all... Not the right item.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「愚蠢…盲目……」
t_en: "Obtuse... blind fools..."

t_ch: …它真懂得该如何惹人生气。
t_en: ...They really know how to get under someone's skin.

t_ch: 不行…这么做就是在浪费时间。
t_en: This won't do... We're just wasting our time.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 令人不快的话语，应该无需再传译了。
t_en: I don't think there's a need for me to convey any words that'll only irritate you further.

t_ch: 看那边，那扇门后是不是摆着一个完全相同的砝码？
t_en: Look, behind that gate. Isn't that the exact same type of weight?

t_ch: 如果能用它配平天秤，再往托盘上加些配重，也许就能解开{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的谜题了。
t_en: If we can use it to balance the scales and add more weight to the pan, we might be able to solve {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s riddle.

t_ch: 直觉告诉我，事情不会如此简单…但现在也想不出更好的办法了。
t_en: My intuition says this won't be that easy... But I suppose we don't have any better solutions at the moment.

t_ch: 要是那位泰坦果真如此孩子气，也许它只是在同我们玩耍。那就陪它玩到满意为止吧。
t_en: If that Titan is truly so childlike, maybe they're just playing with us. In that case, let's play along until they're satisfied.

t_ch: 一切顺利…目前为止。
t_en: Everything's going well... so far.

t_ch: 还有扎格列斯之手的石台，遍地都是。正好省了走回头路的麻烦。
t_en: There are also stone platforms for the Hand of Zagreus all around. This will save us the trouble of doubling back.

t_ch: 果然有效！这样就算再次配平了。
t_en: It worked! Now, the scales have once again been balanced.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「徒劳的尝试…放弃吧…放弃吧。」
t_en: "Futile attempts... Give up... give up."

t_ch: 已经陪你玩得够久了——该认输了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士！
t_en: We've played along with you for long enough. It's time you admitted defeat, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 走吧，我们去完成它的考验。
t_en: Let's go and complete their challenge.

t_ch: 只要让这一侧的托盘沉下去就行，对吗？
t_en: We just have to make the weighing pan on this side drop, right?

t_ch: 想想看…这应该不难。
t_en: Let's think about it... It shouldn't be that difficult.

t_ch: 把炎枪和球棍放上去。
t_en: Place the flaming lance and the baseball bat on it.

t_ch: 你将炎枪和球棍放在了天秤的托盘上……
t_en: You place the flaming lance and the bat on the scale's tray...

t_ch: 纹丝不动……
t_en: It didn't even move an inch...

t_ch: 我掂拿过{NICKNAME}那柄炎枪，很有分量。看来这个办法行不通……
t_en: I've held {NICKNAME}'s flaming lance before and it's quite heavy. Seems like this isn't going to work.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它在嘲弄我们。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... is mocking us.

t_ch: 自己站上去。
t_en: Stand on top of it.

t_ch: 你一个箭步跳到了天秤的托盘上……
t_en: You dexterously leap onto the scale's tray...

t_ch: …你有考虑过增肥吗？
t_en: ...Have you thought of gaining some weight?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，下来吧…看来这样行不通。
t_en: Come down, {NICKNAME}... Seems like this isn't going to work.

t_ch: 攻击天秤的托盘。
t_en: Attack the scale's weighing pan.

t_ch: 你卖力地用棒球棍击打天秤的托盘……
t_en: You swing the baseball bat hard at the scale's tray...

t_ch: …但托盘纹丝不动，你的手臂被巨大的反作用力振得发麻。
t_en: ...But it doesn't budge. And your arm feels numb from the strong recoil.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下？你还好吗？
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}? Are you feeling alright?

t_ch: 看来用蛮力通过考验不是一个选项。
t_en: It seems like we can't rely on brute force to clear this challenge.

t_ch: 我放弃！直接让我过关吧！
t_en: I give up! Just let me pass!

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 它说了什么，遐蝶？
t_en: What did they say, Castorice?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}似乎有些气恼…因为我们把它设下的考验当成了儿戏。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is frustrated... Because we're treating their challenge like a game.

t_ch: 也就是说，我们需要找到字面意义上比「翁法罗斯的命运」更为沉重之物？听上去是一道无解的难题。
t_en: Which means that we have to find something that literally has more weight than the fate of Amphoreus? It sounds like an impossible task.

t_ch: 对于翁法罗斯人，真的存在比这片土地更重要的东西吗？他们甚至没有逃向天外这个选项。
t_en: For the people of Amphoreus, is there really anything that has more weight than this land? They don't even have the option to flee beyond the sky.

t_ch: 比「世界的命运」更为沉重之物……
t_en: Something that has more weight than the fate of the world...

t_ch: …不对，白厄阁下。
t_en: ...No, Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 一定还有其它办法…更周全的办法。即使时间紧迫……
t_en: There must be some other way... A more comprehensive way. Even if our time is tight...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我想到了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I've got it.

t_ch: 我也想到了。
t_en: I've also got it.

t_ch: 我想到了吗？
t_en: Have I got it?

t_ch: 你也想到了？！
t_en: You've also got it!?

t_ch: （装作想到了）
t_en: (Pretend to get it)

t_ch: 把三月的相机给我，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, hand me March's camera.

t_ch: 的确，对翁法罗斯人而言，「世界的命运」实在是过于沉重的砝码。
t_en: Indeed, for the people of Amphoreus, the fate of the world is a weight that is far too heavy.

t_ch: 但或许泰坦也想不到…对于我和{NICKNAME}这两位外来者，我们尚未打心底里融入这个世界的生死存亡。
t_en: But perhaps even the Titan did not expect that... For outsiders like {NICKNAME} and I, we still have not yet become fully involved with the fate of this world.

t_ch: 站在我们的立场，有一样宝物比这个世界——甚至比整片星空——更加重要。
t_en: From our perspective, there is something even more important than this world, or perhaps even the entire cosmos.

t_ch: 那就是与我们一同旅行至今的「同伴」。
t_en: And that's the companions that we have traveled with.

t_ch: 如此一来，就算是通过了泰坦的考验。
t_en: If this is indeed the case, we will have passed the Titan's challenge.

t_ch: 理智尚存的泰坦…真是神秘又伟岸。
t_en: A Titan who still possesses reason... both mysterious and awe-inspiring.

t_ch: 好想把它拍下来。
t_en: I really want to take a photo of them.

t_ch: 我理解，这样的奇观可不多见。
t_en: I understand. Such a spectacle is rare to witness.

t_ch: 真是奇形怪状啊…
t_en: What a strange shape...

t_ch: 每位泰坦都拥有截然不同的形体，有些甚至抛弃了物理的躯壳。
t_en: The Titans all have vastly different physical forms, with some of them even abandoning their physical shell.

t_ch: 似乎没有很强的压迫感。
t_en: It doesn't feel particularly oppressive.

t_ch: 不是每位泰坦都如{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}那般暴戾…而它也并非一直如此。
t_en: Not every Titan is as violent as {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They weren't always like that either.

t_ch: 「我已翻越千万道门径，我已经受天秤的审判。」
t_en: "I have crossed the myriad passages and been judged by the scales."

t_ch: 「它已宣我无罪，它已赐我果实」——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，我们恳求你的帮助！
t_en: "It has deemed me innocent and granted me fruits." — O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. We plead for your assistance!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂正将翁法罗斯推向末日。它摒弃了荣耀，以疯狂的手段复制自身，意图毁灭天父和它庇护的文明。
t_en: The madness of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is pushing Amphoreus toward the end times. They have abandoned their honor, replicating themself through crazed means, and are fully intending to destroy the sky father and the civilization they protect.

t_ch: 请为我们揭示被迷雾遮蔽的过往，引导我们找到熄灭疯狂的办法！
t_en: Please reveal to us the past that has been shrouded in fog and guide us to a way to quench this madness!

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「黄金裔…愤怒，残忍，黑暗的英雄啊……」
t_en: "Chrysos Heirs... Heroes that uphold rage, cruelty, and darkness..."

t_ch: 「你们追随那受诅咒的神谕…将我和同胞们视作猎物……」
t_en: "Pursuing the cursed prophecy... You've treated my kind as prey..."

t_ch: 「以救世为由，你们抢夺火种…任由我在此承受漫无边际的孤独……」
t_en: "In the name of deliverance, you would seize my Coreflame... and leave me to suffer in endless isolation..."

t_ch: 「离开吧…离开。即便世界会因之破碎…我也不会帮助一群屠夫。」
t_en: "Leave... Just leave. Even if the world will be destroyed as a result... I will not help a group of ruthless butchers."

t_ch: 原来如此。的确，弑神者却要寻求猎物的帮助，是多么伪善的一件事啊。
t_en: I see... God-slayers asking their prey for assistance is a hypocritical act indeed.

t_ch: 抱歉，女士，但我们没有时间了…如果交涉达不成目的，我就只能取走你的火种，自己翻看被封存在其中的过往了。
t_en: Then, I can only apologize as we're running out of time... If we're unable to positively conclude our negotiation, you leave me no choice but to take your Coreflame and search through the past locked within it.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 白厄……
t_en: Phainon...

t_ch: 万敌不知已赔上了几条性命，遐蝶。我的犹豫就是对他的残忍。
t_en: Castorice, our hesitation is just cruelty to Mydei. How many lives must he have lost already?

t_ch: 对不起了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: My apologies, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 等等…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的反应有些奇怪。
t_en: Wait... {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s reaction is a little strange.

t_ch: 泰坦，你在呢喃些什么？我无法听清……
t_en: Titan, what are you muttering about? I can't make it out clearly...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「母亲…母亲？」
t_en: "Mother... Mother?"

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，能请您上前吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}似乎在呼唤着你。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, could you please step forward? {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} seems to be calling out for you.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「母亲？母亲……」
t_en: "Mother? Mother..."

t_ch: 这到底…是怎么回事？
t_en: What exactly... is going on?

t_ch: 「是你吗…是你吗？母亲她…邂逅了你。她思念着你……」
t_en: "Is that you... Is that you? Mother... encountered you. She misses you..."

t_ch: 「随我来…请随我来。我看着你…她也想看着你。我们想看见你的全部。」
t_en: "Follow me... Please follow me. I see you... She also misses you. We want to see everything about you."

t_ch: 那位泰坦，是在邀请{NICKNAME}吗？
t_en: Is that Titan extending an invitation to {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我也无法理解。但如果这代表着{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意与我们建立联系，或许值得一试。
t_en: I don't understand either. But if this means that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is willing to establish a connection with us, maybe it'll be worth a try.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请仔细思量……
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please consider carefully...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请。
t_en: Accept Oronyx's invitation.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「跟我来吧…跟着我。和我一起…远瞻你的过去……」
t_en: "Come with me... Follow me and join me... as we look far into your past..."

t_ch: 请再等我片刻…
t_en: Please give me a moment...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「等待…讨厌，等待……」
t_en: "Waiting... Hate waiting..."

t_ch: 如果你打算接受邀请，{NICKNAME}…最好别让它等太久。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you do plan to accept their invitation... it's best that you don't let them wait for too long.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请。
t_en: Accept Oronyx's invitation.

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「跟我来吧…跟着我。和我一起…远瞻你的过去……」
t_en: "Come with me... Follow me and join me... as we look far into your past..."

t_ch: 请再等我片刻…
t_en: Please give me a moment...

t_ch: （泰坦的低语）
t_en: *Titan's murmurs*

t_ch: 「等待…讨厌，等待……」
t_en: "Waiting... Hate waiting..."

t_ch: 如果你打算接受邀请，{NICKNAME}…最好别让它等太久。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you do plan to accept their invitation... it's best that you don't let them wait for too long.

t_ch: 又是你……
t_en: It's you again...

t_ch: 你要带我去哪里？
t_en: Where do you want to take me?

t_ch: 是你。是我。去哪？带你。
t_en: It's you. It's me. Where? With you.

t_ch: 你要窥探…我的记忆吗？
t_en: You want to look into... my memories?

t_ch: 记忆。你的。窥探？好奇。
t_en: Memories. Yours. Look into? Curious.

t_ch: 未来？过去。洞察。秘密……
t_en: Future? Past. Observe. Secrets...

t_ch: 这是…列车？
t_en: This is... the Express?

t_ch: 这是我的记忆吗……
t_en: Is this... a memory?

t_ch: 哪里？这里。
t_en: Where? Here.

t_ch: 又是那个声音…先跟着它吧。
t_en: It's that voice again... Let's follow it.

t_ch: 那是…我？
t_en: Is that... me?

t_ch: 还有姬子跟丹恒…这是哪段记忆？
t_en: There's also Himeko and Dan Heng... What memory is this?

t_ch: …这次收获不错。虽和「剧本」略有偏差，但无伤大雅。
t_en: ...We've got a decent harvest this time. Although we deviated slightly from the "script," it's not a big deal.

t_ch: 辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。你没有受伤，我很欣慰。
t_en: Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}. I'm very glad that you're not hurt.

t_ch: 呵…不发表几句感言吗？带着两个沉默寡言的人一起旅行，感觉有点孤单哦。
t_en: Heh... Not going to share what's on your mind? Traveling with two quiet people really makes the trip feel a little lonely.

t_ch: …我饿了。
t_en: ...I'm hungry.

t_ch: 只有这种时候才会开口么？来吧，晚餐已经准备好了。
t_en: Is this really the only time you'll say something? Come on, dinner is ready.

t_ch: …如果可以，这次不要乱斩牛杂了。
t_en: ...If possible, can we not have Beef Offal Stew for once?

t_ch: 怎么，不喜欢家乡的风味？
t_en: Why? You don't like the taste of home?

t_ch: 我讨厌内脏的腥气。
t_en: I dislike the gamey taste of offal.

t_ch: 怎么回事…这真的是我的记忆吗？
t_en: What's going on...? Are these really my memories?

t_ch: 我对这段对话完全没有印象…姬子和丹恒的语气也变得很不一样。这到底是……
t_en: I have no recollection of this conversation at all... Himeko and Dan Heng's tone also seem different. What exactly is going on...?

t_ch: 记忆。遗忘，错乱。
t_en: Memory. Forgotten, chaotic.

t_ch: 我们。迷惑，解开。
t_en: We. Confusion, uncover.

t_ch: 卡芙卡…刃？！
t_en: Kafka... Blade!?

t_ch: 不对，这不是我的记忆…一定是哪里出了差错。
t_en: No, these aren't my memories... There must have been some mistake.

t_ch: 记忆，偏差？无误。真实。
t_en: Memories, discrepancies? Correct. Truth.

t_ch: 深层，埋藏。遗忘。遗忘……
t_en: Depths, hidden. Forgotten. Forgotten...

t_ch: 你有什么忌口吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Do you have any dietary restrictions, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我什么都吃。
t_en: I'll eat anything.

t_ch: 真是不挑食啊。
t_en: You really aren't picky about food.

t_ch: 又是一组「不存在的记忆」…这次连萨姆也在。
t_en: Another set of nonexistent memories... This time, Sam's also here.

t_ch: 从这个角度重新认识自己…有些怪异。
t_en: Getting to know myself from a different perspective... feels a little strange.

t_ch: 这次的「剧本」完成得太过凶险，多亏{NICKNAME}灵活应变，我们才逃出生天。
t_en: The "script" turned out to be extremely dangerous. It's only because of {NICKNAME}'s quick thinking that we managed to escape.

t_ch: 总是在刀尖上旋舞的话，意外迟早会找上我们…卡芙卡。
t_en: Dancing on the razor's edge all the time, it's only a matter of time before disaster catches up with us... Kafka.

t_ch: 我接受你的批评，萨姆。的确…有「剧本」在，我们从未考虑过失败的可能。
t_en: I accept your criticism, Sam. Indeed... Because of the "script," I failed to consider the possibility of failure.

t_ch: 我想，即便是星核猎手也需要一个「撤退信号」，用来应对危机的局面。
t_en: I suppose even Stellaron Hunters could use a retreat signal to respond to dire circumstances.

t_ch: 择日不如撞日，不如现在就来想一个吧？
t_en: There's no time like the present. Why don't we come up with one right now?

t_ch: 交给你们吧。
t_en: I'll leave it to you.

t_ch: 阿刃？
t_en: Bladie?

t_ch: 「观隅反三……」
t_en: "Three of a kind..."

t_ch: 「君命无二……」
t_en: "Two pair..."

t_ch: 「凭城借一。」
t_en: "Ace."

t_ch: 啊…颇有仙舟气息的口号呢。你不怕被过往束缚吗？
t_en: Ah... It reeks of Xianzhou. Aren't you afraid you'll be bound by your past?

t_ch: 只是一句旧时的暗号…无妨。我们没什么机会用上。
t_en: It's just a passphrase from the past... No matter. There won't be a need for us to use it.

t_ch: 「观隅反三，君命无二，凭城借一」——
t_en: Three of a kind, two pair, ace...

t_ch: ——真是顺口且博雅的口号啊。
t_en: What a catchy yet refined catchphrase.

t_ch: 下次玩弄猎物的时候，记得在心中多念诵几遍。
t_en: Remember to recite this a few more times in your mind the next time you're toying with your prey.

t_ch: 你什么时候变得这么不饶人了？
t_en: When did you become so ruthless?

t_ch: 到底是怎么回事……
t_en: Just what is going on...

t_ch: 这些记忆，明明不存在于我的脑海中…却又如此真实，无可辩驳。
t_en: These memories obviously don't exist in my mind... But they feel so real that I cannot dispute them.

t_ch: 卡芙卡转头望向你，她的脸上浮现了那个你无比熟悉的笑容…一半冰冷，一半温暖。
t_en: Kafka turns to look at you, her face showing that familiar smile — half cold, half warm.

t_ch: 发生什么事了吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: What's the matter, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我需要一个解释…
t_en: I need an explanation...

t_ch: …解释？
t_en: ...Explanation?

t_ch: 为什么我忘记了你…
t_en: Why did I forget about you?

t_ch: …忘记？
t_en: ...Forget?

t_ch: 我做了什么令你不快的事吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, did I do something that made you unhappy?

t_ch: 我们是伙伴，我不希望有任何事物挡在我们中间，包括疑虑。
t_en: We're partners, and I don't want anything to come between us, not even doubt.

t_ch: 我想……
t_en: I think...

t_ch: 卡芙卡…
t_en: Kafka...

t_ch: 卡芙卡？
t_en: Kafka?

t_ch: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
t_en: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

t_ch: 卡芙卡别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
t_en: Kafka turns away, ignoring your call.

t_ch: 刃的余光扫过你的面庞，留下了一道炽热的轨迹。在与他有限的晤面次数里，你从未见过那么…冷静的目光。
t_en: Blade's glance brushes over your face, leaving a burning trail. In your limited encounters with him, you've never seen such... a calm and logical look in his eyes.

t_ch: 你怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: 我怎么会和你们在一起？
t_en: Why am I with you guys?

t_ch: 我需要一个解释……
t_en: I need an explanation...

t_ch: 我们受「剧本」指引聚在一处，暂时完成一个共同的目标…仅此而已。
t_en: Guided by the "script," we've assembled here to temporarily accomplish a common goal... That's all.

t_ch: 其余诸事，我不关心。
t_en: I don't care about anything else.

t_ch: 我只奉劝你一句——别让卡芙卡失望。为了把你留在这里…她付出了很多。而且……
t_en: I'll give you one piece of advice — don't let Kafka down. She sacrificed a lot to keep you here... furthermore...

t_ch: 刃？
t_en: Blade?

t_ch: 话不要只说一半…
t_en: Don't leave me hanging...

t_ch: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
t_en: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

t_ch: 刃别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
t_en: Blade turns away, ignoring your call.

t_ch: 银狼抬头看向你，眼神中满是不耐烦。你从未以全息影像之外的形式和她对过话——和这位天才骇客四目相对的体验颇有些新鲜。
t_en: Silver Wolf looks up at you, her eyes filled with impatience. You've never spoken with her outside of a hologram — meeting this genius hacker face-to-face is quite novel.

t_ch: …有事吗？我在下副本，没空闲聊。
t_en: ...What's up? I'm in a raid and don't have time for small talk.

t_ch: 我是怎么加入你们的？
t_en: How did I join you guys?

t_ch: 别玩了，快告诉我真相！
t_en: Stop playing and tell me the truth!

t_ch: 唉…我这才加入多久，有问题的话，去问卡芙卡不行吗？
t_en: Oh... I've only just joined recently. If you have questions, can't you just ask Kafka?

t_ch: 线上游戏不能暂停，失陪啦。
t_en: Anyway, online games cannot be paused. So, if you don't mind.

t_ch: 银狼？
t_en: Silver Wolf?

t_ch: 我是怕你沉迷。
t_en: I'm just worried you'll become addicted.

t_ch: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
t_en: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

t_ch: 银狼低下头，不再理会你的呼唤。
t_en: Silver Wolf looks down, ignoring your call.

t_ch: 流萤转头看向你，流露出的表情与你印象中的那位少女有些许不同——更加忧郁，更加幽深。
t_en: Firefly turns to you, her expression slightly different from the girl you remember — more melancholic, more profound.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…有什么事吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Can I help you?

t_ch: 你为什么会在这里…
t_en: Why are you here...

t_ch: 我为什么会在这里…
t_en: Why am I here?

t_ch: 怎么了，你看起来…很紧张。
t_en: What's wrong? You seem... very nervous.

t_ch: 别怕，一切都会尘埃落定的。我们再通读一遍「剧本」吧……
t_en: Don't worry, the dust will eventually settle. Let's go through the "script" one more time...

t_ch: 流萤？
t_en: Firefly?

t_ch: 「剧本」是什么…
t_en: What "script"...

t_ch: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
t_en: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

t_ch: 流萤别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
t_en: Firefly turns away, ignoring your call.

t_ch: 我无法理解…这一切到底有什么意义？
t_en: I don't understand... What's the point of all of this?

t_ch: 美好的…被封存的……
t_en: Happiness... sealed away...

t_ch: 母亲…你还在那里吗？
t_en: Mother... Are you still there?

t_ch: 你可在看着？
t_en: Are you watching?

t_ch: …泰坦？
t_en: ...Titan?

t_ch: …欧洛尼斯？
t_en: ...Oronyx?

t_ch: …我能听懂你说的话了？
t_en: ...I can understand what you're saying now?

t_ch: 逆流的记忆…在敲打。
t_en: Memories flowing in reverse... Pounding.

t_ch: 窗外…记住，要看向窗外。
t_en: Outside the window... Remember. Look outside the window.

t_ch: 你是谁？！
t_en: Who are you!?

t_ch: 刚才发生了什么？！
t_en: What just happened!?

t_ch: 这就解锁新命途了吗？！
t_en: Did I unlock a new Path just like that!?

t_ch: 你是？我是…是谁？
t_en: You are? I am... Who?

t_ch: 目光，注视。窗外，冰冷。
t_en: Gaze, watching. Outside, cold.

t_ch: 你…温暖。温暖，喜欢。
t_en: You... warm. Me like, warmth.

t_ch: 这一切都不合逻辑…
t_en: All of this does not make sense...

t_ch: 有没有人能给我解释一下？
t_en: Can anyone explain this to me?

t_ch: 疑惑…相同。答案，未知。
t_en: Confusion... Same. Answer, unknown.

t_ch: 我终于找到了…宝贵的记忆。我终于…吸引了祂的目光。
t_en: I've finally found it... Precious memory. At long last... I've caught THEIR gaze.

t_ch: 与{F#她}{M#他}同行吧，<color=#dbc291ff>迷迷</color>……
t_en: Accompany {M#him,}{F#her,} <color=#dbc291ff>Mem</color>...

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}会让世界的记忆重新完整…{F#她}{M#他}会找到…母亲……
t_en: {M#He}{F#She} will make the memories of this world complete once again... {M#He}{F#She} will find... Mother...

t_ch: 「迷迷」是你的名字？
t_en: Is your name "Mem"?

t_ch: 名字？我的？不记得。
t_en: Name? Mine? Don't remember.

t_ch: 迷迷…称呼，暂时。
t_en: Mem... Address. Temporarily.

t_ch: 母亲…是谁？
t_en: Who is... Mother?

t_ch: 母亲？是谁？不记得。
t_en: Mother? Who? Don't remember.

t_ch: 「迷迷」是你的名字？
t_en: Is your name "Mem"?

t_ch: 名字？我的？不记得。
t_en: Name? Mine? Don't remember.

t_ch: 迷迷…称呼，临时。
t_en: Mem... Address. For now.

t_ch: 旅行，喜欢。和你，一起？
t_en: Travel, like. With you, together?

t_ch: 记忆…收集。拼凑，完整。
t_en: Memory... collected. Piece together, complete.

t_ch: 尼卡多利的弱点…
t_en: Nikador's weakness...

t_ch: …你能帮我们找到吗？
t_en: ...Can you help us find it?

t_ch: 多利…尼卡？泰坦？
t_en: Ador... Nik? Titan?

t_ch: 需要，记忆。帮助…我会。
t_en: Need, memories. Help... I can.

t_ch: 那就和我一起来吧。
t_en: Then come with me.

t_ch: 只要能帮得上忙就行。
t_en: As long as you're able to help.

t_ch: 记忆中的影子……
t_en: Shadow in the memory...

t_ch: 他们…是你的伙伴吗？
t_en: They... are your companions?

t_ch: 对，是伙伴。
t_en: Yes, they are my companions.

t_ch: 我也说不清楚…
t_en: I also can't say for sure...

t_ch: 不，他们是敌人。
t_en: No, they are enemies.

t_ch: 坏人。麻烦。帮助，需要。
t_en: Bad people. Troublesome. Help, needed.

t_ch: 一起…伙伴？
t_en: Together... Friend?

t_ch: 总算来了啊，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: You're finally here, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我知道你不会错过，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I knew you wouldn't miss this, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 剧本上写着「不留活口」…{NICKNAME}。
t_en: The script says, "Leave no survivors." ...{NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我很高兴能有你在，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I am glad to have you here, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我们所行的这条路绝不平坦…它伴随着烈火，伤痕，恶意和杀生。但我向你保证，只要与星核猎手并肩，你就永远不必品尝背叛的滋味。
t_en: This path is anything but smooth... it's marked by flames, scars, malice, and bloodshed. But I guarantee, as long as you stand with the Stellaron Hunters, you will never know the pain of betrayal.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…来吧，和我们一同登台吧。在「剧本」里，我们是银河舞台最绚烂的主演，镜头绝对不会从你身上移开。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Come, join us on stage. In the script, we are the most brilliant actors on the cosmic circuit, and the focus will always be on you.

t_ch: 所有画面以外的洒血和悲鸣都只是主角的陪衬。我们会一同起舞，逆流而上，直到宇宙的「终末」。
t_en: All the bloodshed and cries beyond the screen are merely there to serve as the backdrop for the main characters. Together, we will dance against the current, until the universe meets the Finality.

t_ch: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 起舞吧——{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 胜利，胜利！
t_en: Victory, victory!

t_ch: 强大，伙伴！
t_en: Mighty, companions!

t_ch: 星核猎手…消失了。
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters... disappeared.

t_ch: 消失，暂时。
t_en: Disappear, temporarily.

t_ch: 记忆，存在…一直。
t_en: Memories, remain... Always.

t_ch: 我想离开这里了。
t_en: I want to leave this place.

t_ch: 离开…到了，时间。
t_en: Leave... It's, time.

t_ch: 记忆，存在…一直。
t_en: Memories, remain... Always.

t_ch: 流萤…
t_en: Firefly...

t_ch: 卡芙卡…
t_en: Kafka...

t_ch: 先等等…
t_en: Wait...

t_ch: 告别。时间，还有。
t_en: Farewell. Time, there is.

t_ch: 伙伴，遗憾…不留。
t_en: Companions, regrets... Don't leave.

t_ch: 卡芙卡…还有流萤。
t_en: Kafka... and Firefly.

t_ch: 我该和谁告别…？
t_en: Who should I bid farewell to...?

t_ch: 啊…{NICKNAME}，是你。
t_en: Oh, {NICKNAME}, it's you.

t_ch: 「剧本」又顺利完成了，对吗？有你在我们身边，总是令人安心。
t_en: We've successfully completed the "script" once again, right? It's always reassuring to have you by our side.

t_ch: 怎么了吗？你这样的表情…我从没见过。
t_en: Is something the matter? I've never seen you look like this before.

t_ch: 我记不起任何事…
t_en: I can't remember anything...

t_ch: 我们真的见过面？
t_en: Have we really met before?

t_ch: 我不想再遇见你。
t_en: I don't want to meet you again.

t_ch: 这是…什么意思？
t_en: What... does that mean?

t_ch: 发生什么了吗？我…我也不知道该不该这样问你。我只是…想表达一些关心，对同伴的关心。
t_en: What happened? I... I don't actually know whether I should ask you this question. But... I just wanted to express my concern, for my companion.

t_ch: 我们好像一起旅行过…
t_en: We seem to have traveled together before...

t_ch: 我把一切都忘了…
t_en: I have forgotten everything...

t_ch: 我不知道你在说什么。
t_en: I don't understand what you're saying.

t_ch: 这样吗…这一次同行，也会迎来戛然而止的时刻吗？
t_en: Is that so... Will this journey also be cut short suddenly?

t_ch: 但…没关系。既然你出现在了这里，那就证明我们的道路还会交汇。你还活着，我也会活下去。尚未到来的分别不会是永别。
t_en: But... it's okay. You being here means our paths are bound to cross again. You're alive, and I will continue living. The parting that has yet to happen will not be an eternal one.

t_ch: 我们的确重逢了。
t_en: We did reunite.

t_ch: 那真是太好了。
t_en: That's fantastic.

t_ch: 再次见面…会的。
t_en: Meeting again... It will happen.

t_ch: 那真是太好了。
t_en: That's fantastic.

t_ch: 我不想和你多说什么。
t_en: I have nothing more to say to you.

t_ch: 嗯…不必说什么，你的眼睛已经给了我答案。
t_en: Hmm... There's no need to say anything. Your eyes have already given me an answer.

t_ch: 我会努力忘记这件事，把它封藏进脑海深处…等到分别的那一天，我会把你的话当作重聚的约定。
t_en: I'll try to forget this and lock it away in the depths of my memory... When the day of our parting comes, I'll treat your words as a promise for our reunion.

t_ch: 当再次邂逅的那天到来，我想…我会假装我们素未谋面，再重新认识你一次，让一切都从头开始。
t_en: When the day we cross paths again arrives, I think... I'll pretend we've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over.

t_ch: 我还要尽最大的努力向你直抒胸襟…因为现在，我还做不到这点。
t_en: I will also try my best to express my thoughts openly to you... Because right now, I'm still unable to do it.

t_ch: 真是值得期待的一天。两个人——不再是共犯，只是在银河间漂泊的两个灵魂——普普通通地相见，普普通通地相识……
t_en: A day worth waiting for. Two people — no longer accomplices, just two drifting souls in the cosmos — meeting and getting to know each other in the most ordinary way...

t_ch: …那就是我能够想象的，最大的奢侈。
t_en: ...That is the greatest luxury that I can ever imagine.

t_ch: 我该走了，流萤。
t_en: It's time for me to leave, Firefly.

t_ch: 再见了，不存在的记忆。
t_en: Farewell, nonexistent memory.

t_ch: 对，这个表情才是我熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: That's it, that look on your face is the {NICKNAME} that I know.

t_ch: 你要离开了，对吗？因为你要去做一件重要的事…你总是明白什么才是最重要的事。
t_en: You're leaving, right? Because there's something important that you have to do... You always understand what's the most important.

t_ch: 快去吧，{NICKNAME}。哪怕全都忘记了也没关系…我会代替你把第二次邂逅的约定铭刻于心。
t_en: Go, {NICKNAME}. It doesn't matter if you forget everything... I shall engrave the promise of our second reunion in my heart on your behalf.

t_ch: 希望那是一个有流星划过的美丽夜晚。
t_en: I hope that it'll be a beautiful night with shooting stars.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…你来了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... You're here.

t_ch: 这一次的「剧本」也顺利完成了。
t_en: Once again, we've completed the "script" without a hitch.

t_ch: 发生什么了吗？你现在的表情…有些脆弱。
t_en: Has something happened? You look... vulnerable.

t_ch: 我不记得任何事…
t_en: I don't remember anything...

t_ch: 我们很久没见了。
t_en: We haven't met in quite a while.

t_ch: 是你抛弃了我吗？
t_en: Did you abandon me?

t_ch: 你知道我永远不会那么做，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: You know I'd never ever do that, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 讲给我听吧。你早就习惯同我倾诉了，不是吗？
t_en: Tell me what's on your mind. You're used to confiding in me by now, aren't you?

t_ch: 我们好像一起旅行过…
t_en: We seem to have traveled together before...

t_ch: 我把一切都忘了…
t_en: I have forgotten everything...

t_ch: 我不想和你多说什么。
t_en: I have nothing more to say to you.

t_ch: 原来如此…你把自己的「过去」弄丢了，你感到很无助。
t_en: I see... You have lost your "past" and are feeling very helpless.

t_ch: 很遗憾，我不是命运的奴隶，无法观测未来——我填补不了你记忆的空洞，也没法告诉你我们后来共同经历了些什么。
t_en: Unfortunately, I'm not Destiny's Slave. I can't peer into the future. I can neither fill the gaps in your memory nor tell you what we later experienced together.

t_ch: 我们分别了…然后又重逢了。
t_en: We parted ways... and met again once more.

t_ch: 那就是说，我会失而复得。
t_en: That means you'll come back to me.

t_ch: 再次见面时的情景…我还记得。
t_en: The scene of us meeting again... I still remember it.

t_ch: 那就是说，我会失而复得。
t_en: That means you'll come back to me.

t_ch: 我更希望自己没见过你。
t_en: I wish that I hadn't met you.

t_ch: 多残酷的字句啊…你后来一定又经历了许多。
t_en: Such cruel words... You must have gone through a lot afterward.

t_ch: 但你终会与我重逢，那也就意味着…我会失而复得。
t_en: But in the end, we will meet again, which also means... I'll always get you back.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说——</color>
t_en: {NICKNAME}, <color=#dbc291ff>listen...</color>

t_ch: 我猜，在那篇我还未曾读到的剧本上，你一定会遇到很多危险，置身可怕的困境。
t_en: I suppose, in that script I haven't yet read, you'll face plenty of danger and end up in dreadful predicaments.

t_ch: 你大概也会遇到许多美妙的事情，拥有像家人一样的同伴——哪怕不再是我们，星核猎手。
t_en: You'll probably also experience many wonderful things and find companions who feel like family, even if it's no longer with us, the Stellaron Hunters.

t_ch: 你应该也会踏上做梦也想象不到的冒险吧？毕竟，你就是为冒险而生的。
t_en: You'll also embark on adventures beyond your wildest imagination. After all, you were born for adventure.

t_ch: 我想让你一直记住的事，只有一件：无论你去向何处，身处银河的哪个角落…你永远都可以在我这里找到一座避风港。
t_en: There's only one thing that I want you to always remember: No matter where you go or which corner of the cosmos you may be in, you will always be able to find a safe haven by my side.

t_ch: 我的耐心并不多…对你，我永远不会吝惜。
t_en: Patience may not be my virtue... But toward you, it is something that I will never lack.

t_ch: 我该走了，卡芙卡。
t_en: It's time for me to leave, Kafka.

t_ch: 再见了，不存在的记忆。
t_en: Farewell, nonexistent memory.

t_ch: 再见了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 当命运将你置于岔路时…大胆地做出选择吧，不要惧怕后悔。
t_en: When fate places you at a crossroads... make your choice boldly, and don't fear regret.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，发生什么了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what happened?

t_ch: 我昏过去了多久？
t_en: How long did I pass out for?

t_ch: 昏过去？你在说什么？
t_en: Pass out? What are you talking about?
